data.text: WELCOME TO THE B EXPRESS 31 INTERCHANGE. THIS IS THE LAST STATION
ON THE BALASTRACKONASTREYA EXPRESS LINE. WE HOPE YOU ENJOYED
YOUR JOURNEY THROUGH THE NAMED STAR CLUSTERS ALONG THIS LINE.
THE NEXT NAMED STAR CLUSTER IS THE 'ANCESTRY' CLUSTER, NAMED BY
RYAN GJK, LOCATED AT THE RIM NEAR STAR'S END, NAMED BY
STARDRIFTER SCHMERM. NEAR THIS STATION YOU WILL FIND THE S00
ASLAN, ABOUT 30 LY AWAY, TOGETHER WITH S00 LUMNI AND S08
GENOREVA. IT IS UNCLEAR WHO NAMED THESE STARS. THERE MAY BE SOME
LINES ALREADY PLANNED, UNDER CONSTRUCTION OR FULLY OPERATIONAL
AROUND HERE LEADING TO THE 'ALPHA STAR' CLUSTER OR THE RIM
(THE LATTER IS NOT LIKELY TO BE COMPLETED SOON)
